system.description:
◇◇ *magical* A small bronze cauldron, full of glittering coins. At least, that’s what it seems. When you **_fill the pot with small, natural_** **_items (leaves, stones, acorns, etc.) and hide_** **_it from light for a season_**, the contents are glamoured to become a purse of gold ◇ (Value 4). Any “coins” removed from the pot revert to their true form when… … an honest merchant touches them;
… their current owner tells a lie;
… someone sees through the glamour;
… something dispels the glamour; or
… the new moon comes and goes *An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.YMV8KIodnoZL71Jl]{Fae}.*
